name: semwitness
description: Proof-carrying compression, bounded intent evaluation, and held-out promotion gates.

interface.shortDescription: Verify compression, intent candidates, and held-out promotion evidence.
interface.longDescription: SemWitness analyzes context, verifies deterministic compression, evaluates bounded intent compilers, and compiles host-attested held-out provider/runtime evidence into fail-closed host promotions without transparent prompt interception or cache authorization.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this context for safe token savings with SemWitness.
Simulate compression and verify the resulting proof bundle.
Replay this fixture and compare its measured token cost.
Evaluate this held-out promotion evidence and emit a manifest only if every gate passes.
Evaluate this intent normalizer offline in shadow mode.
Evaluate an OpenAI-compatible intent compiler with explicit network opt-in and a request budget.
